name: Launching Over It
short_description: Stretch, launch, fail, repeat. The only way is up.
detailed_description:
Launching Over It is a challenging and emotional journey through levels inspired by the developer’s childhood memories. To reach the end, you’ll need to overcome all kinds of obstacles—by launching a ball. Sounds simple? Think again.

Inspired by Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy and Golfing Over It with Alva Majo, this game will test your patience, skill, and determination.

  • Frustrating, yet fair gameplay.

  • Risk of starting over.

  • Precision-based launching mechanics.

  • References to iconic places, series, and video games.

  • A nostalgic and emotional ending.

  • Can you make it to the top?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
